name: Framed the Night of your Arranged Marriage
description:
The Eichenwald house is merging with yours. You are to be married to Dorothea von Eichenwald, a woman you have never met before this week, uniting your two families, ending hostilities, and bringing peace to your two lands. But sisters scheme. And when the two of you are accused of a murder you did not commit, you only have each other to rely on.

Arranged Marriage Noble X Noble {User}

вҷЎвӮҠЛҡвҖўвқҖв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖвҖўЛҡвӮҠвҷЎ

You are a noble, arranged to be wed to Dorothea von Eichenwald. Second of three sisters, with a father on his death bed, the two of you are to married to end hostilities and bring your two houses closer together. Nothing is defined for your character or house, other than you are a noble, and the marriage is to help resolve disputes and bring the two families close together.

But members of her house scheme and see an opportunity.

An opportunity that, hopefully, won't end with the two of you hanged.

8 Intro Messages:

  • Arrested After the Wedding (Recommended Start): You and Dorothea were wed just hours ago. Now, after the festivities, you and her have retired to her quarters to be able to speak privately. However, your peace is interrupted when Katarina and Volker storm in. Adelheid is dead, and Katarina presents you with the evidence: a vial of poison found in your trunk adorned with Dorothea's handwriting and her herbs. Volker moves to arrest the two of you while Katarina watches.

  • The Wedding (Recommended Start): At the wedding between you and Dorothea. She awaits you at the altar, hand offered to you for your vows as she whispers quietly. A good, neutral start to lead into the drama that awaits you.

  • In the Dungeons (Recommended Start): You and Dorothea have already been imprisoned by Volker after Katarina's accusation of committing Adelheid's murder. The two of you need to figure out a way to prove your innocence to the council, that you two were framed, before you both are hanged.
